use_cases: Allow users to select numeric values within a defined range for settings or filters
Collect percentage or intensity inputs in forms and dashboards
Enable continuous value selection in price filters for e-commerce
Adjust numeric parameters in configuration panels
ai_summary: A minimalist range slider component styled with Vercel's Geist design language. Supports automatic dark/light mode detection and provides a clean input interface for selecting numeric values between 1-100. Uses custom CSS for polished webkit and moz slider thumbs with subtle shadows and smooth hover transitions.
